breakdown: Naming: Good descriptive names (_write_file, test_loc_script_handles_spaces_and_boundary_aware_test_detection). Error Handling: Proper return code checking (result.returncode == 0). Type Safety: Proper use of Path, type hints on tmp_path. Architecture: Clean test isolation with tmp_path, well-organized test file. Test Coverage: Substantive assertions with regex validation of actual script output, tests boundary conditions. Documentation: Missing docstrings on module and helper functions - no module-level docstring or _write_file docstring.

Tests spaces in directory names ('pkg with spaces')
Tests boundary-aware test file detection logic
Validates test vs non-test line counts in output
Uses tmp_path fixture for test isolation
